title: Siemens U273 AC global small-signal reference
scientificBoundary: This is the global AC chain currently justified by the schematic: B11/S6/S7 finite command port + B6 bridge/input small-signal. Full BJT output AC requires conditional stamps and remains guarded.

rows.scientificBoundary: B6 full schematic inventory is closed, but active BJT AC stamps are guarded until conditional hypotheses are selected.
